task_completion.description: Format the Title Block (first 4 lines) to be centered, with the school name in Bold 16pt and exam name in Bold 14pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top of the document. The first four lines should be centered. 'Westfield Regional High School' should appear visibly larger (16pt) and bold. 'Biology 101 — Final Examination' should also be bold and slightly smaller (14pt) than the school name.
Look for the paragraph beginning with 'INSTRUCTIONS:'. The entire text of this paragraph must be slanted (italicized).

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to the section headers 'Part A', 'Part B', and 'Part C'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the section headers 'Part A', 'Part B', and 'Part C'. They should be formatted using the word processor's default 'Heading 2' style (typically larger, bold, and possibly a different font or color than body text). The style dropdown in the toolbar might also show 'Heading 2' when these are selected.

task_completion.description: Format all other body text to 'Liberation Serif' (or Times New Roman), 12pt, with 1.5 line spacing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main question text. The font should be a serif font (like Times New Roman or Liberation Serif), size 12pt, and there should be visible vertical gaps between the lines indicating 1.5 line spacing. The toolbar should reflect these settings when body text is selected.

task_completion.description: Set page margins to 1.00 inch on all sides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the horizontal and vertical rulers in the word processor; the grayed-out margin areas should indicate exactly 1 inch on the left, right, top, and bottom. Alternatively, look for a 'Page Style' or 'Page Setup' dialog box showing 1.00" margins.

task_completion.description: Include a footer on every page with 'Biology 101 — Final Examination' and page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin of the pages. There should be a visible footer section containing the text 'Biology 101 — Final Examination' along with a page number (e.g., '1', 'Page 1', etc.).

task_completion.description: Center and bold the final line '--- END OF EXAMINATION ---' and save as bio101_final_exam.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the very end of the document. The text '--- END OF EXAMINATION ---' must be centered and bolded. Also, look at the application title bar or a 'Save As' dialog to confirm the file is named 'bio101_final_exam.docx' and saved in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with a word processor GUI, not using terminal commands (like pandoc or python scripts) to bypass manual formatting.

integrity.description: The agent used proper formatting tools rather than manual spacing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Centering should be done via the 'Center Align' button, not by repeatedly pressing the spacebar. Line spacing should be set via paragraph properties, not by hitting 'Enter' multiple times.

integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen opening '/home/ga/Documents/bio101_final_raw.docx' initially, applying formatting to the existing text, and then saving it as the new filename.
